requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability, EMC Evidence, and EAEU TR CU 020/2011
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作、EMC证据及EAEU TR CU 020/2011
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作、EMC證據及EAEU TR CU 020/2011

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Armenia should be treated as site- and operator-specific systems requiring back-office interoperability, remote monitoring, billing or access-control integration, and utility or project-owner acceptance. OCPP is the practical international protocol for charge-point-to-back-office communication unless the tender requires another protocol. EMC evidence must be prepared under IEC 61000-series expectations and, for in-scope products placed on the Armenian market, EAEU TR CU 020/2011 on electromagnetic compatibility. PSRC and ENA may also require power-quality, harmonic, or site commissioning evidence for grid-connected installations.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚联网电动汽车充电桩应按站点和运营方专属系统处理，须满足后台互操作、远程监控、计费或访问控制集成，以及公用事业方或项目业主验收。除非招标另有规定，OCPP是充电点到后台通信的实务国际协议。EMC证据应按IEC 61000系列预期准备；对于进入亚美尼亚市场的范围内产品，还须满足EAEU TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容要求。PSRC和ENA也可能要求并网安装的电能质量、谐波或现场调试证据。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞聯網電動汽車充電樁應按站點和運營方專屬系統處理，須滿足後台互操作、遠程監控、計費或訪問控制集成，以及公用事業方或項目業主驗收。除非招標另有規定，OCPP是充電點到後台通訊的實務國際協議。EMC證據應按IEC 61000系列預期準備；對於進入亞美尼亞市場的範圍內產品，還須滿足EAEU TR CU 020/2011電磁相容要求。PSRC和ENA也可能要求併網安裝的電能質量、諧波或現場調試證據。

standards_or_laws: EAEU TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical products
OCPP — charge point to central system communication protocol
IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required for CCS2 DC communication
PSRC / ENA site commissioning and power-quality requirements to be verified for each project

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. GB/T 27930 is not a substitute for OCPP back-office interoperability and is not the CCS2 communication stack. China-market chargers may also use operator-specific cloud protocols. EMC tests prepared only for China domestic schemes must be mapped to TR CU 020/2011 and IEC 61000 requirements before Armenia shipment.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信协议。GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP后台互操作，也不是CCS2通信栈。中国市场充电桩还可能采用运营商专属云协议。仅按中国国内体系准备的EMC测试，须在出口亚美尼亚前映射至TR CU 020/2011和IEC 61000要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP後台互操作，也不是CCS2通訊棧。中國市場充電樁還可能採用運營商專屬雲協議。僅按中國國內體系準備的EMC測試，須在出口亞美尼亞前映射至TR CU 020/2011和IEC 61000要求。

standards_or_laws: China domestic EMC test standards for electrical equipment

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the required OCPP version, backend integration test, SIM / network security settings, firmware update process, remote fault reporting, payment or access-control interface, and local data or operator requirements. Separately, they must prepare EMC reports acceptable for TR CU 020/2011 / EAC and any IEC 61000 evidence required by the project. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC vehicle communication and a China-only cloud platform is not ready for an Armenian OCPP / CCS2 project.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认所需OCPP版本、后台集成测试、SIM / 网络安全设置、固件更新流程、远程故障报告、支付或访问控制接口，以及当地数据或运营方要求。同时，须准备TR CU 020/2011 / EAC可接受的EMC报告，以及项目要求的任何IEC 61000证据。仅具备GB/T 27930直流车辆通信和中国专属云平台的充电桩，不适合直接用于亚美尼亚OCPP / CCS2项目。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認所需OCPP版本、後台集成測試、SIM / 網絡安全設定、韌體更新流程、遠程故障報告、支付或訪問控制接口，以及當地數據或運營方要求。同時，須準備TR CU 020/2011 / EAC可接受的EMC報告，以及項目要求的任何IEC 61000證據。僅具備GB/T 27930直流車輛通訊和中國專屬雲平台的充電樁，不適合直接用於亞美尼亞OCPP / CCS2項目。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where TR CU 020/2011 applies to in-scope products; OCPP or backend interoperability is mandatory where required by tender, CPO, utility, or project-owner specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 applies to China domestic DC vehicle communication and is not an OCPP backend or CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Armenia, treat EMC and interoperability as separate gates: TR CU 020/2011 / EAC and IEC 61000 evidence for EMC, plus OCPP or project-specified backend integration for network operation. GB/T 27930 alone does not cover either gate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向亚美尼亚，应将EMC和互操作作为两个独立门槛：EMC需TR CU 020/2011 / EAC及IEC 61000证据，联网运营需OCPP或项目指定后台集成。单独的GB/T 27930不能覆盖任一门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向亞美尼亞，應將EMC和互操作作為兩個獨立門檻：EMC需TR CU 020/2011 / EAC及IEC 61000證據，聯網運營需OCPP或項目指定後台集成。單獨的GB/T 27930不能覆蓋任一門檻。
